school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Greenhouse goes with exactly three of Frost, Jonah, 80%, and Period 5.
Between Bungalow and Greenhouse, one goes with Carver and the other with Frost.
Either Period 4 goes with Bungalow or Dunn goes with 80%.
Hale's grade is higher than both the class in the Workshop's grade and the class with Liam's grade.
Dunn, Ellis, and 84% go with Kira, Period 4, and Period 5, in some order.
Either Period 1 goes with Workshop or Library goes with 80%.
The class in Period 3's grade is at least 6% more than Carver's grade.
Period 2 goes with at most one of Carver, Kira, and 78%.
Iris goes with exactly two of Dunn, Workshop, 80%, and Period 2.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: London goes with exactly three of Nadia, Gambit, 1843, and 1st.
Between Benoni and London, one goes with Boris and the other with Nadia.
Either 2nd goes with Benoni or Magnus goes with 1843.
Vera's rating is higher than both the Sicilian player's rating and the player who loves the Skewer's rating.
Magnus, Mikhail, and 1943 go with Pin, 2nd, and 1st, in some order.
Either 5th goes with Sicilian or Pirc goes with 1843.
The player who placed 3rd's rating is at least 150 more than Boris' rating.
4th goes with at most one of Boris, Pin, and 1793.
Fork goes with exactly two of Magnus, Sicilian, 1843, and 4th.
